subcodes.first_line: O friends! These are the days of the All-Merciful and the manifestation of human stations. Strive ye through the name of the Beloved of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان ایام رحمن است و ظهور مراتب انسان جهد نمائید تا باسم محبوب عالمیان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @call to action
